violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Raw beef and chicken stored next to each other and above eggs and shrimp in walk in cooler. Store according to cook temperatures.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoop used at beverage station stored in cabinet on dirty/stained cardboard liner.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. FOH cabinets at beverage station not properly sealed. Bare wood surfaces.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Ice machine needs cleaning.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Line cooking equipment prep cooler need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Wire rack shelving/storage shelving need cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors and walls in walk in cooler have build up of food and debris and need cleaning. Floors in kitchen have build-up of food and debris under equipment and along wall junctures and need cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Walls have damage/holes in back storage area along floor juncture.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
